approvedBy: Steve continuous-builder priority + Codex Foundation builder session
approvalSource: Steve prioritized safe extractor/source-auth preflight work and explicitly instructed not to run live extraction, private auth, paid access, external writes, Drive mutation, Gmail/ClickUp sends, Agent Feedback auto-send, or hidden subagents unless separately approved.
scopeSummary: Create a metadata-only MyICOR source/auth preflight packet from repo truth. Prove source contract, connector, validation, and source-auth boundaries keep paid-course extraction blocked until source-specific approval exists.
notApproved: Do not use private auth, paid auth, or an authorized browser session.
Do not crawl, navigate lessons, fetch transcripts, capture screenshots/keyframes, download course content, summarize course content, run vision, or call a model.

Do not copy course content, lesson text, transcript text, resource links, screenshots, keyframes, or summaries into repo docs, Postgres, artifacts, Research Inbox, KB, atoms, action routes, vectors, or chat-only closeout.
Do not write Research Inbox rows, KB pages, atoms, synthesis facts, action routes, vector/query indexes, or backlog content from extracted material.
Do not mutate Drive, Gmail, ClickUp, Slack, Agent Feedback, or external systems.
Do not launch hidden subagents, invisible workers, or parallel extraction workers from this card.
